ReportTitle.title: R_LOSS告警长时间告警未恢复统计

root.sql:
select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g1, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.region_name g2, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.vendor_name g3, tia_alarm_dict1.txt g4, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.eqp_label g5, tia_alarm_dict2.txt g6, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.ne_label g7, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.alarm_title_text g8, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.org_severity g9, to_char(tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g10, to_char(tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.cancel_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g11 from tpa_rloss_overlong_detail tpa_rloss_overlong_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict1 on tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.eqp_object_class = tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.object_class = tia_alarm_dict2.id where tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.region_id in (#areaID#)
)a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql: select count(*) from (select to_char(tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.first_result,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g1, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.region_name g2, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.vendor_name g3, tia_alarm_dict1.txt g4, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.eqp_label g5, tia_alarm_dict2.txt g6, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.ne_label g7, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.alarm_title_text g8, tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.org_severity g9, to_char(tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g10, to_char(tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.cancel_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') g11 from tpa_rloss_overlong_detail tpa_rloss_overlong_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict1 on tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.eqp_object_class = tia_alarm_dict1.id left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.object_class = tia_alarm_dict2.id where tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tpa_rloss_overlong_detail.region_id in (#areaID#) )

Conditions.Condition: select distinct region_name as text, region_id as value from region_city_local
